appsync.graphqlapi.AdditionalAuthenticat.Docs: A list of additional authentication providers for the `GraphqlApi` API.

appsync.graphqlapi.AuthenticationType.Docs: Security configuration for your GraphQL API. For allowed values (such as `API_KEY`, `AWS_IAM`, `AMAZON_COGNITO_USER_POOLS`, `OPENID_CONNECT`, or `AWS_LAMBDA`), see [Security](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/appsync/latest/devguide/security.html) in the *AWS AppSync Developer Guide*.

appsync.graphqlapi.LambdaAuthorizerConfi.Docs: A `LambdaAuthorizerConfig` holds configuration on how to authorize AWS AppSync API access when using the `AWS_LAMBDA` authorizer mode. Be aware that an AWS AppSync API may have only one Lambda authorizer configured at a time.

appsync.graphqlapi.Tags.Docs: An arbitrary set of tags (key-value pairs) for this GraphQL API.

appsync.graphqlapi.UserPoolConfig.Docs: Optional authorization configuration for using Amazon Cognito user pools with your GraphQL endpoint.

appsync.graphqlapi.XrayEnabled.Docs: A flag indicating whether to use AWS X-Ray tracing for this `GraphqlApi`.
